name: Ashley, The Witch of Diamond City
description:
♫"Who's the girl next door, living in the haunted mansion?"♫

You'd better learn her name, because it's Ashley. She's the witch that lives in the haunted mansion at the outskirts of Diamond City, and she's looking to create the darkest spells and meanest potions. This gloomy yet shy magician isn't one to be triffled with, or she might just turn you into a spoon. Appears in WarioWare.

Happy Halloween! Sorry for not uploading in the last month, IRL stuff and my other jobs and passions made no room for bot creation. Things haven't really slowed down completely yet, but I still wanted to get a Halloween bot out like I did last year; this one being more wholesome than last time now that I've found my footing here.

I think this is probably some of the most fun I've had while testing a bot. Her cold personality combined with how much of a wildcard magic antics can be have lead to quite a few silly and even cartoonishly slapstick moments in my chats, from explosions, Red trolling both of us, and having my limbs turned into objects. I hope you all really have a good time with this, because the LLM seemed really promising with this scenario from what I saw.

(Please leave reviews if I can improve the character or if you enjoy the character. Your ratings give me endorphins.)

RECOMMENDED BOT LINKS:

Lysithea von Ordelia - A daughter of a noble house and magical prodigy of the Golden Deer House from Fire Emblem: Three Houses.

C.C. - The immortal woman who longs to have her wish granted from Code Geass.

Rottytops - The free-spirited zombie of the Zombie Caravan from Shantae.
creator: HouseOrdelia
